events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need parse task. Scenario: Material transitions residential plumbing. Selected tool and material package matches size, rating, application on referenced sheet. Staged parts clean, intact, sized. Reference IPC, mfr listings. Need evaluate field condition and return decision. Since staged, materials correct, no defects. Decision likely pass. Need fill fields. Work_stage should be staged (as observed). Percent complete maybe 0 (staged not begun). Component_conditions empty. Risk low. Value 0. Confidence high. Sound etc default. Findings empty. Actions maybe none. Rationale: materials match spec and code, ready for installation. References IPC and mfr listings. Need ensure JSON valid.
